title: Silicone Ice Cube Tray with Lid - 2 Pack 6 Square Large Ice Cube Tray, BPA Free, Easy Release, Stackable Ice Cube Moulds for Whiskey, Cocktails, Baby Food, Juice, Ice Cream
features: Large Ice Cube Tray: Our big ice cube tray can make 6 huge ice cube at once, each 1.9 inches. With this perfect size and classic shape, ice cubes quickly cool your drink and slowly melt, keeping your whiskey cool until the last drop

Safe and Durable: The ice cube mold set is made of food grade silicone, which is tough and elastic, can be used in freezers and dishwashers. BPA free silicone ice cube moulds can directly come into contact with food, safe to make baby food

Easy to Fill & Release: Silicone freezer moulds are different from ordinary hard plastic ice cube trays. Flexible ice trays can be easily pushed or twisted from the bottom to remove ice cubes, making it no longer a difficult task to remove ice cubes

Space-saving: The ice cube tray with lid effectively protects ice cubes from odors, makes stacking easier, saves refrigerator space, and facilitates storage. With these removable covers to prevent spills, you can easily create perfect ice cubes

Widely Used: This multifunctional ice cube trays silicone is perfect for gatherings, restaurants, beaches, and holiday entertainment. Using big ice cube tray can cool your favorite drinks such as cocktails, whiskey, coffee, juices for a long time
description: The latest improvement of the product: the ice cube tray makes 12 XXL beautiful large ice cubes. Keep fridge odors out with these removable lids. In addition, the lid prevents spills and evaporation.
